children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not more than 4 percent of the total amount of funds received under this subchapter for any fiscal year by a State may be used for administrative costs.

children.heading: Construction
children.label: b Construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to limit spending for evaluation costs under from sources other than this subchapter.section 9134(c) of this title
